name: w6-regenerate-locale
title: W6 regenerate-with-locale: AI cached artifacts (handoff / daily report / commit summary) regenerate in the app language on an explicit regenerate action
description: Thread an OPTIONAL language? (human-readable English language NAME, e.g. "Traditional Chinese" / "English") from the client through the three regenerate callables into their flows and prompts. The prompt change is a single CONDITIONAL line appended only when language is present ('Write your entire response in {language}.') — for generateHandoff into BOTH the Phase-1 drafting system prompt AND the Phase-2 reviewer system prompt; for summarizeDay into the narrative/finalize system prompt (counts/contributions stay language-neutral); for explainCommit into its system prompt (doc path + GitHub fallback path). language absent/empty => byte-identical prompt to before (zero behavior change for auto/scheduled generation). Result shapes, cache semantics, and the force flag are unchanged; language is independent of force but the UI sends it together with force=true on regenerate. Frontend: a tiny AppLocale->English-name map (en->English, zhHant->Traditional Chinese) exposed via AppLocaleX.backendLanguage + AppStrings.backendLanguage; the existing regenerate entry points (daily report generate/regenerate, commit recompute, handoff regenerate) pass it; FunctionsService + FakeFunctionsService signatures extended; fakes annotate canned data so a regenerate is visibly different.
creator: gitsync
notes: IMPLEMENTED + SELF-CLOSED (no external review gate — full cycle owned by the implementer). Language-value convention: client sends a clear English language NAME derived from the app locale (en->"English", zhHant->"Traditional Chinese") via AppLocaleX.backendLanguage; simplest, most reliable signal for the model; documented in prd.md + code. Prompt change = single conditional line appended only when language is non-empty (trimmed); absent/empty => byte-identical prompt (regression-tested per artifact). Handoff: line reaches BOTH phase prompts (drafting + reviewer). summarizeDay: narrative system prompt only; deterministic counts untouched. explainCommit: system prompt on doc path AND GitHub fallback path. Handlers add optional language?: string validated as string + passed through. Handoff regenerate button already existed (task_details_page _regenerateHandoff) — wired, none added. Gates: backend typecheck 0 / lint 0 / jest 37 suites 318 tests (was 310, +8); flutter analyze 3 pre-existing issues (no new), flutter test 91 pass +1 pre-existing fail (was 85, +6, no new failures). No new npm/pub deps, no deploy, no firestore changes, no generated plugin-registrant files committed. Merge note: generateHandoff.ts / summarizeDay.ts are W1/W3 touch points — flagged for orchestrator merge from the checked-out integration branch (likely conflict-free, additive changes).

meta.reviewedBy: self (no external reviewer — full cycle owned)
